title: Windows LOLBin Usage Frequency Anomaly
description: Identifies hosts with abnormally high usage of living-off-the-land binaries (LOLBins), which may indicate fileless malware or attacker tool usage.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and 'Process Name' in ('certutil.exe', 'mshta.exe', 'regsvr32.exe', 'rundll32.exe', 'wscript.exe', 'cscript.exe', 'msbuild.exe', 'bitsadmin.exe', 'wmic.exe', 'installutil.exe') | stats count as lolbin_count, distinctcount('Process Name') as distinct_lolbins by 'Host Name' | where lolbin_count > 20 or distinct_lolbins >= 4 | sort -lolbin_count
notes: Individual LOLBin usage may be legitimate, but high frequency or diversity of LOLBin usage on a single host is unusual. Compare against baseline.
